basic_details.job_title: SVIMS Tirupati Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026: 236 Vacancies, Eligibility, Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS), Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, Tirupati
basic_details.application_mode: Online only, through the "Jobs" tab on the SVIMS website
basic_details.short_information: The Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS), Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, Tirupati, has invited online applications for the post of Staff Nurse through direct recruitment. The recruitment is issued vide Notification No. 01/Nursing/2026/Estt. dated 13.07.2026, offering a total of 236 vacancies (24 backlog + 212 regular). Applications are open to candidates native to the State of Andhra Pradesh (post bifurcation), and persons professing the Hindu religion alone are eligible to apply. This article covers the complete vacancy breakup, eligibility, age limit, application fee, sele

important_dates.computer-based test (cbt) date, time & v: Not yet released. To be intimated to shortlisted candidates through e-mail/SMS

application_fee.details: Fees must be paid online through UPI, credit card, debit card or net banking via the payment gateway provided on the application portal. No other mode (bank draft, cheque, etc.) is accepted. Any transaction/processing fee charged by the bank is payable by the applicant, in addition to the application fee. The application fee, once remitted, is non-refundable under any circumstances - including if the application is rejected or the notification is cancelled. Applications submitted without payment of the prescribed fee will be summarily rejected.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation rules: | SC, ST, BC and EWS candidates: 5 years' relaxation in the maximum age limit. Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD): 10 years' relaxation. Ex-servicemen: 3 years, in addition to the length of service rendered in the armed forces. Persons presently working in SVIMS on Adhoc/Outsourcing/Contract basis: 5 years' relaxation, subject to completion of a minimum of 5 years of service in SVIMS as on the date of the notification. Maximum age limit with all relaxations put together is 52 years.

qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy either of the following two routes: | Route 1: B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized university, and registration with the Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council. Route 2: Intermediate examination or an equivalent qualification, and a General Nursing Course of three years' duration plus Midwifery training of six months' duration from an institution recognized by the Nursing Council of India, plus three years of experience in a Medical College/tertiary care hospital, and registration with the Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council. | Desirable qualifications: BLS & ACLS training certificates, and knowledge of computer applications.

selection_process: Component Marks Details
Written Test (Computer-Based Test) 75 75 multiple-choice questions, 1 mark each, 90-minute duration. No negative marking. Conducted through AP Online Service at various test centres.

Experience 15 1 mark per completed 6-month block of relevant service in Govt./Semi-Govt./Public Sector institutions or hospitals with a minimum 500-bed strength meeting statutory (EPF/ESI) compliance. Maximum 15 marks.
Interview 10 Conducted after shortlisting based on written test and experience marks.
Selection is based on a total of 100 marks
distributed as follows:
Additional points on selection:
If total applications received for the post are less than 10
selection is based on weightage of marks in the qualifying examination
experience
and interview. If applications exceed 10
a computer-based online test is conducted. Minimum qualifying marks in the CBT: 40% for OC & EWS
35% for BC
and 30% for SC
ST & PwBD categories. The question paper for the CBT will be in English. Where two or more candidates score equal marks
the elder candidate (by age) is given preference; in case of a further tie

the candidate with more experience is preferred. A waitlist is maintained for a period of one year in case a provisionally selected candidate does not join. Selection is provisional and subject to verification of original certificates
community/local status
antecedents
and medical fitness. Candidates must not be in a bigamous marriage and must not have been convicted by any court of law to be eligible.

syllabus.details: The CBT syllabus, as per Annexure-I of the notification, is divided into two parts: | Basic Sciences: Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Microbiology Fundamentals of Nursing: basic procedures, biomedical waste management, first aid, medication administration, patient ethics and records Medical-Surgical Nursing including Pharmacology: cardiovascular, respiratory, gastroenterology, endocrinology, renal, neurological, oncology, palliative and critical care nursing, OT protocols, pre/post-operative care, BCLS, drug dosage computation Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing: reproductive systems, maternal health, gynaecological disorders, neonatal emergencies and NICU Child Health Nursing: growth and development, paediatric care including NICU, childhood diseases, ENBC, FBNBC, PLS Mental Health Nursing: assessment, psychiatric disorders, therapeutic interventions and counselling Nursing Management, Supervision & Nursing Education: leadership, ward/hospital management, health education, HIMS Community Health Nursing: epidemiology, immunization, public health services, national health schemes | Mathematical aptitude: number systems, fractions, decimals, percentages, ratios, averages, profit and loss, interest General English and Computers: reading comprehension, error spotting, grammar, vocabulary, health/nursing information technology

how_to_apply: Visit the official SVIMS website: https://svimstpt.ap.nic.in
Go to the Jobs tab and select the Staff Nurse Recruitment notification (No. 01/Nursing/2026/Estt.).
Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational and experience details.
Upload clear scanned copies of all required original certificates as per the checklist in the notification.
Pay the prescribed application/examination fee online through UPI, credit card, debit card or net banking.
Submit the application on or before 10.08.2026, 11:59 p.m. No corrections are allowed after submission.
Regularly check the SVIMS official website and your registered e-mail/SMS for updates on the CBT schedule.
important_instructions: The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment notification at any stage, and to fill or not fill any or all posts. Vacancies notified are provisional and subject to variation. Candidates may choose a test centre with three preferences; however, AP Online Services reserves the right to allot any centre based on resource availability. Requests for centre change will not be entertained. Applicants must bring a hard copy of the admit card and valid photo identity proof to the examination centre; failing this, entry will be denied. Mobile phones (even switched off), calculators, smart watches, cameras, Bluetooth devices and other electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited in the examination hall. No TA/DA will be paid by the Institute for attending the written test or interview. Candidates must not have been convicted by a court of law and must not be in a bigamous marriage. SVIMS reserves the right to issue corrigenda, amendments or addenda as necessary - candidates should keep checking the official website. Any query regarding filling of the application form must be addressed to APONLINE; no other mode of communication will be entertained. Mere participation in the examination or securing qualifying marks does not confer any right to appointment. Selection is provisional and subject to document verification.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should read the official notification (No. 01/Nursing/2026/Estt., dated 13.07.2026, E-Office-C No. 3092852) carefully before applying, as it contains the complete vacancy, eligibility and selection details, along with the prescribed syllabus in Annexure-I. content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.details: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS), Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, Tirupati
Native to the State of Andhra Pradesh (post bifurcation)
Persons professing Hindu religion alone are eligible to apply
Online only, through the "Jobs" tab on the SVIMS website

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Important Dates
content_sections.text: No mode of application other than online will be entertained. No corrections in the application will be entertained through any mode (e-mail, letter, etc.) after online submission.

rows.date: Not yet released. To be intimated to shortlisted candidates through e-mail/SMS

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: Horizontal reservation posts are reserved for Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD), Meritorious Sports Persons, Ex-Servicemen and Women, as per G.O.Ms.No.77, dated 02.08.2023, issued by the General Administration (Services-D) Department. Horizontal reservations are adjusted within the respective vertical categories as per applicable rules.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must satisfy either of the following two routes: Route 1: B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized university, and registration with the Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council. Route 2: Intermediate examination or an equivalent qualification, and a General Nursing Course of three years' duration plus Midwifery training of six months' duration from an institution recognized by the Nursing Council of India, plus three years of experience in a Medical College/tertiary care hospital, and registration with the Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council. Desirable qualifications: BLS & ACLS training certificates, and knowledge of computer applications.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation rules: SC, ST, BC and EWS candidates: 5 years' relaxation in the maximum age limit. Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD): 10 years' relaxation. Ex-servicemen: 3 years, in addition to the length of service rendered in the armed forces. Persons presently working in SVIMS on Adhoc/Outsourcing/Contract basis: 5 years' relaxation, subject to completion of a minimum of 5 years of service in SVIMS as on the date of the notification. Maximum age limit with all relaxations put together is 52 years .

rows.details: 01.07.2026 (as per G.O.Ms.No.109, General Administration (Service-A) Department, dated 08.10.2025)

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fees must be paid online through UPI, credit card, debit card or net banking via the payment gateway provided on the application portal. No other mode (bank draft, cheque, etc.) is accepted. Any transaction/processing fee charged by the bank is payable by the applicant, in addition to the application fee. The application fee, once remitted, is non-refundable under any circumstances - including if the application is rejected or the notification is cancelled. Applications submitted without payment of the prescribed fee will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on a total of 100 marks , distributed as follows: Additional points on selection: If total applications received for the post are less than 10, selection is based on weightage of marks in the qualifying examination, experience, and interview. If applications exceed 10, a computer-based online test is conducted. Minimum qualifying marks in the CBT: 40% for OC & EWS, 35% for BC, and 30% for SC, ST & PwBD categories. The question paper for the CBT will be in English. Where two or more candidates score equal marks, the elder candidate (by age) is given preference; in case of a further tie, the candidate with more experience is preferred. A waitlist is maintained for a period of one year in case a provisionally selected candidate does not join. Selection is provisional and subject to verification of original certificates, community/local status, experience, antecedents, and medical fitness. Candidates must not be in a bigamous marriage and must not have been convicted by any court of law to be eligible.

rows.details: 75 multiple-choice questions, 1 mark each, 90-minute duration. No negative marking. Conducted through AP Online Service at various test centres.

1 mark per completed 6-month block of relevant service in Govt./Semi-Govt./Public Sector institutions or hospitals with a minimum 500-bed strength meeting statutory (EPF/ESI) compliance. Maximum 15 marks.
Conducted after shortlisting based on written test and experience marks.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Syllabus (Computer-Based Test)
content_sections.text: The CBT syllabus, as per Annexure-I of the notification, is divided into two parts: Basic Sciences: Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Microbiology Fundamentals of Nursing: basic procedures, biomedical waste management, first aid, medication administration, patient ethics and records Medical-Surgical Nursing including Pharmacology: cardiovascular, respiratory, gastroenterology, endocrinology, renal, neurological, oncology, palliative and critical care nursing, OT protocols, pre/post-operative care, BCLS, drug dosage computation Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing: reproductive systems, maternal health, gynaecological disorders, neonatal emergencies and NICU Child Health Nursing: growth and development, paediatric care including NICU, childhood diseases, ENBC, FBNBC, PLS Mental Health Nursing: assessment, psychiatric disorders, therapeutic interventions and counselling Nursing Management, Supervision & Nursing Education: leadership, ward/hospital management, health education, HIMS Community Health Nursing: epidemiology, immunization, public health services, national health schemes Mathematical aptitude: number systems, fractions, decimals, percentages, ratios, averages, profit and loss, interest General English and Computers: reading comprehension, error spotting, grammar, vocabulary, health/nursing information technology

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload clear scanned copies of original certificates at the time of online application, including: Date of birth proof / SSC certificate Educational qualification certificates and marks memos of the prescribed qualifying examinations Community certificate (for SC/ST/BC candidates, showing the specific classification/group), issued by the competent authority EWS certificate (where applicable), issued on or after 1 April 2026 by the concerned Tahsildar, confirming gross annual family income for FY 2025-26 is below ₹8,00,000 Valid SADAREM certificate specifying nature and percentage of disability (for PwBD candidates) Original certificates for Meritorious Sports Persons category (as per G.O.Ms.No.47, dated 19.04.2025), where applicable Discharge Certificate and Pension Order (for Ex-Servicemen category), where applicable Study/residence certificate (Appendix-I format, as per G.O.Ms.No.729, dated 01.11.1975) Valid Andhra Pradesh Nursing Council Registration Certificate (mandatory) Latest and original Nativity/Residence Certificate issued by the concerned Tahsildar Experience certificate(s) from the Head(s) of the concerned institution/organization, along with EPF statements for the last 2 years No Objection Certificate from the employer, if currently employed in a government department Salary proof/pay slips and EPF/ESI statements, wherever applicable Note: Allowing a candidate to appear for the examination based on uploaded documents does not mean the documents are accepted as genuine - actual verification is done at the time of appointment. Submission of false certificates or information may lead to cancellation of candidature and criminal proceedings.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official SVIMS website: https://svimstpt.ap.nic.in Go to the Jobs tab and select the Staff Nurse Recruitment notification (No. 01/Nursing/2026/Estt.). Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational and experience details. Upload clear scanned copies of all required original certificates as per the checklist in the notification. Pay the prescribed application/examination fee online through UPI, credit card, debit card or net banking. Submit the application on or before 10.08.2026, 11:59 p.m. No corrections are allowed after submission. Regularly check the SVIMS official website and your registered e-mail/SMS for updates on the CBT schedule.

content_sections.heading: SVIMS Staff Nurse Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment notification at any stage, and to fill or not fill any or all posts. Vacancies notified are provisional and subject to variation. Candidates may choose a test centre with three preferences; however, AP Online Services reserves the right to allot any centre based on resource availability. Requests for centre change will not be entertained. Applicants must bring a hard copy of the admit card and valid photo identity proof to the examination centre; failing this, entry will be denied. Mobile phones (even switched off), calculators, smart watches, cameras, Bluetooth devices and other electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited in the examination hall. No TA/DA will be paid by the Institute for attending the written test or interview. Candidates must not have been convicted by a court of law and must not be in a bigamous marriage. SVIMS reserves the right to issue corrigenda, amendments or addenda as necessary - candidates should keep checking the official website. Any query regarding filling of the application form must be addressed to APONLINE; no other mode of communication will be entertained. Mere participation in the examination or securing qualifying marks does not confer any right to appointment. Selection is provisional and subject to document verification.

faq.question: Q1. How many Staff Nurse vacancies are there in SVIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 236 vacancies are notified - 24 backlog and 212 regular vacancies.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 10.08.2026, up to 11:59 p.m. The portal opened on 15.07.2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for SVIMS Staff Nurse posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need either a B.Sc. Nursing degree with AP Nursing Council registration, or an Intermediate pass plus a 3-year General Nursing Course and 6-month Midwifery training, along with 3 years of tertiary-care hospital experience and AP Nursing Council registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 42 years of age as on 01.07.2026, with relaxations up to a maximum of 52 years for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ₹2,360/- for OC/EWS candidates and ₹1,770/- for BC/SC/ST candidates. PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. Is SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 open to candidates from all states?
faq.answer: No. Applications are invited only from candidates native to the State of Andhra Pradesh (post bifurcation of the state), and only persons professing the Hindu religion are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SVIMS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Computer-Based Test (75 marks), Experience (15 marks) and Interview (10 marks), totalling 100 marks. Minimum qualifying marks in the CBT are 40% for OC/EWS, 35% for BC, and 30% for SC/ST/PwBD.

faq.question: Q8. Is there negative marking in the SVIMS Staff Nurse computer-based test?
faq.answer: No, there is no negative marking in the 75-mark written test.

faq.question: Q9. When will the SVIMS Staff Nurse exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The exact date, time and venue of the Computer-Based Test are Not yet released and will be intimated to candidates through e-mail/SMS.

faq.question: Q10. Can I correct my SVIMS Staff Nurse application after submission?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that no corrections will be entertained through any mode after online submission.
